recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luig

recommendations.title: Sorry to Bother You
recommendations.overview: In an alternate present-day version of Oakland, black telemarketer Cassius Green discovers a magical key to professional success – which propels him into a macabre universe.

recommendations.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
recommendations.overview: A hapless inventor finally finds success with a flying car, which a dictator from a foreign government sets out to take for himself.

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: Equestria Girls
recommendations.overview: Via a magic mirror, Twilight Sparkle travels into an alternate universe in order to recover a crown that was stolen from the Crystal Empire. Upon her arrival she is horrified to learn that she has turned into a human.

recommendations.title: Condorito: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Condorito must find a way to rescue his mother in law from an ancient race of aliens which wants to enslave the universe once again.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Gods and Monsters
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe, very different versions of DC's Trinity fight against the government after they are framed for an embassy bombing.

recommendations.title: The New Monsters
recommendations.overview: A comedy film composed of 14 episodes. It is a sequel to I mostri, made in 1963. 1. The Finch of Val Padouan (Ettore Scola) - 2. Tantum ergo (Dino Risi) - 3. Hitchhiking (Mario Monicelli) - 4. Kidnapping of a Beloved Person (Ettore Scola) - 5. First
recommendations.director: Ettore Scola, Mario Monicelli, Dino Risi

recommendations.title: Theodore Rex
recommendations.overview: In an alternate futuristic society, a tough female police detective is paired with a talking dinosaur to find the killer of dinosaurs and other prehistoric animals leading them to a mad scientist bent on creating a new Armageddon.

recommendations.title: Super Mario Brothers: Great Mission to Rescue Princess Peach
recommendations.overview: When Princess Peach is kidnapped by the monster King Koopa, Mario and his brother Luigi journey to the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue her.
